title: structure.route_capture output
description: Plan §4.1-§4.2 — the four-action routing decision. The action enum has exactly four values; the merge / create_folder paths carry additional gating constraints documented inline. reasoning_trace is hard-capped at 280 chars (~70 tokens) per §4.2 — the schema enforces what the grammar layer makes structurally impossible to violate.

action.description: Plan §4.1 — exactly four routing actions. `defer` is the highest-trust fallback, not failure (§4.6).

folder_path.description: Required when action = place or create_folder; the destination folder.

target_note_path.description: Required when action = merge_into_existing_note; the existing note to append to. §4.5 gate: confidence >= 0.90 AND target's last-edited > 24h.

new_folder_name.description: Required when action = create_folder; new folder kebab-case 2-48 chars. §4.5 gate: genuinely new concept (no existing within cosine 0.92), >=3 neighbour notes clustered (cosine >=0.8), no existing parent fits.

confidence.description: Plan §4.3-§4.5 floors: Variant A >=0.85, B >=0.75, C >=0.70. Below all three -> action='defer'.

reasoning_trace.description: Hard-capped at 280 chars (~70 tokens) per §4.2 / Brief-Is-Better arxiv:2604.02155. Qwen 1.5B peaks at ~32 reasoning tokens; 256+ degrades below no-CoT baseline.

alternative_paths.description: Top-3 candidate folders not chosen — surfaced in the Layer-2 action trace UI so the user can override with one keystroke.
